Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The art club members are[n]painting inside the art room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember meeting here in the[n]art room for art club activities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a lot of time painting with Hiraga.[n]This place is filled with memories...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember meeting here in the[n]art room for art club activities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I joined as a member, but[n]I didn't show up much...[n]{f 1 1}
